label: Base Tools
description: git, curl, jq, tmux, and htop.

label: Web Runtime
description: Python runtime, venv support, and pip.

label: Operator Directories
description: Create data, logs, state, radio, and SDR directories.

label: Web Service
description: Install and enable the systemd service for the web panel.

label: Events Service
description: Install and enable periodic event collection.

label: Presence Script
description: Install the scan-control-aware foreground presence scanner.

label: Edge Node MQTT
description: Local MQTT broker and clients for ESP32-C6 edge-node telemetry.

label: ESP32 Plane Tracker
description: Publish compact ADS-B aircraft summaries over MQTT for an ESP32-C6 display.

label: Wi-Fi Fallback
description: NetworkManager tooling for known-network and hotspot fallback.

label: Ham Tools
description: FLRig and basic packet radio utilities where available.
